title: phonological awareness
instructions: 처음 소리나 끝소리가 비슷한 말을 듣고 맞는 것을 고르세요.

practiceItems.prompt: 바다와 같은 처음 소리로 시작하는 것은 무엇일까요?
practiceItems.notes: Uses spoken fallback because final recorded stimuli are not attached yet.
Uses spoken fallback because final recorded stimuli are not attached yet.

testItems.prompt: 해와 같은 처음 소리로 시작하는 것은 무엇일까요?
testItems.notes: Uses spoken fallback because final recorded stimuli are not attached yet.

testItems.prompt: 공과 같은 끝소리가 들리는 것은 무엇일까요?
testItems.notes: Uses spoken fallback because final recorded stimuli are not attached yet.

testItems.prompt: 소와 같은 처음 소리로 시작하는 것은 무엇일까요?
testItems.notes: Uses spoken fallback because final recorded stimuli are not attached yet.

notes: Content is playable and manifest-backed, but still uses fallback speech synthesis instead of final recorded assets.
